response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the lyrics for 'Yume Miru Sora e' and 'We are GAMERS!!!!'. I have identified that Scene 3 in the reference JSON is incorrect; the video continues with the verses of 'We are GAMERS!!!!' (Okayu and Korone) rather than switching to 'Mogu Mogu YUMMY!'. I am discarding the incorrect JSON reference for Scene 3 and relying on the audio and on-screen title. All timestamps are strictly aligned to the vocal audio.
